title: Vendor
description: Represents a vendor (supplier) entity in Dynamics 365 Business Central. Vendors are the parties from whom the company purchases goods or services. Each vendor record contains contact information, financial settings, and payment terms.

id.description: The unique identifier (GUID) of the vendor record

number.description: The vendor number, a unique business identifier assigned automatically or manually

displayName.description: The display name of the vendor

addressLine1.description: The first line of the vendor's street address

addressLine2.description: The second line of the vendor's street address

city.description: The city of the vendor's address

state.description: The state or province code of the vendor's address

country.description: The country/region code of the vendor's address

postalCode.description: The postal or ZIP code of the vendor's address

taxRegistrationNumber.description: The vendor's tax registration number (VAT number or similar)

currencyId.description: The unique identifier of the currency used for this vendor

currencyCode.description: The currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) used for transactions with this vendor

paymentTermsId.description: The unique identifier of the payment terms assigned to the vendor

paymentMethodId.description: The unique identifier of the payment method used for the vendor

taxLiable.description: Indicates whether the vendor is liable for sales tax

blocked.description: Specifies which transactions are blocked for the vendor: blank (none), Payment, or All

balance.description: The current balance owed to the vendor (read-only, computed)

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the vendor record was last modified (read-only)
